stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
The pilot of a light, single engined aircraft has partly filled out a load sheet while waiting for a female passenger. When she arrives, the passenger weighs herself and her baggage for the pilot to complete the load sheet. Given the following masses, what is the Total Gross Mass of the aircraft with this passenger and the baggage included?

Passenger: 135 lb
Baggage: 25 lb
